sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49102" key="qrh/nerws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρήν-ερως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n49102.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a querulous lover</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.189</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
